videos.headline: Cincinnati's Brendan Sorsby connects with Jeff Caldwell for a TD
videos.description: Brendan Sorsby throws a touchdown to Jeff Caldwell to give Cincinnati a 7-0 lead.

videos.headline: Jeff Caldwell brings in his 2nd TD for Cincinnati
videos.description: Brendan Sorsby hits Jeff Caldwell in the end zone to extend Cincinnati's lead.
